summary: Joel Spolsky announces the return of the podcast he co-hosts with Jeff Atwood, formerly the Stack Overflow Podcast, now rebranded as the Stack Exchange Podcast. The post provides links to subscribe via iTunes, SoundCloud, or the Stack Exchange Blog. He credits Alex Miller as the new producer and promises technical improvements to come.
key_points: The Stack Overflow Podcast has been rebranded to the Stack Exchange Podcast, reflecting the platform's expansion beyond Stack Overflow
The podcast is available across multiple platforms including iTunes, SoundCloud, and the Stack Exchange Blog
A new producer, Alex Miller, has been brought on to improve the podcast's technical quality
money_quotes: Jeff Atwood and I have resumed our weekly podcast, formerly known as the Stack Overflow Podcast, now known as the Stack Exchange Podcast!
SoundCloud is sort of like a sound version of Twitter, a very cool way to subscribe to audio.
key_insight: The rebranding from Stack Overflow Podcast to Stack Exchange Podcast signals the company's strategic evolution from a single Q&A site into a broader network of communities.
